active_candidate_note: Restored to repair_attempt_02.arch after attempt 04 regressed valid packet tests.

attempts.hypothesis: Invalid header/checksum packets may be expected to produce the same zero-result response as unknown opcodes instead of being silently discarded.
attempts.failure_summary: Evaluator still reported test_invalid_checksum and test_invalid_header failing; 8/10 tests passed.

attempts.hypothesis: Invalid packets should be discarded immediately on the final received byte so the controller remains in S_IDLE and can accept the next packet without spending validation cycles.
attempts.failure_summary: Evaluator still reported test_invalid_checksum and test_invalid_header failing; 8/10 tests passed.

attempts.hypothesis: Invalid header/checksum packets may be expected to generate an explicit error response with result 16'hFFFF.
attempts.failure_summary: Evaluator still reported test_invalid_checksum and test_invalid_header failing; 8/10 tests passed.

attempts.hypothesis: The transmit handshake may require tx_start_o to pulse for one cycle per byte; held-high tx_start_o could leak into invalid-packet no-response checks.
attempts.failure_summary: Evaluator regressed to 0/10 tests passing; all packet tests failed.
